title: The Spy Who Came in from the Cold
writer: John le Carré, Paul Dehn, Guy Trosper
actors: Richard Burton, Oskar Werner, Claire Bloom
plot: Instead of coming in from field work during the Cold War and taking a desk job, British intelligence agent Alec Leamas chooses to take on another assignment.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 10 wins & 5 nominations total
